raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Health for All bill seeks to provide full scope Medi-Cal coverage to all income-eligible adults, removing immigration status as grounds for exclusion.",
    "Health and immigration rights advocates have successfully fought for coverage for children and young adults up to age 26, regardless of immigration status.",
    "The Assembly and State Senate budgets are aligned to provide full scope Medi-Cal coverage to income-eligible undocumented adults 50 years of age and older.",
    "Inclusion of undocumented adults 50 years of age and older would be a significant step toward achieving the goals of AB 4.",
    "The COVID-19 emergency exacerbated the racial and ethnic disparities in the health care system.",
    "The virus disproportionately affected ethnic minorities, particularly Latinos, during the pandemic."
  ]
}
```
